---
title: "AirtempGroundtempPlots_Ch2"
author: "Mirella Shaban"
date: "2026-01-20"
output: html_document
---


# 8 = 10cm
# 10 = 30cm

#need to switch out winddirection & Date (Ch1 data, daily_2022_2024.csv) to winddirectionection & Date (Ch2 data, all_var_combined_22_25_BEO_COMP.csv)

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r}
filepath = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/shabanm2/Utqiagvik/main/Meteorological_Seasons_Data/" # where daily avg data are located
#for Ch1, Utqiagvik/main/Analysis ready data/
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
```

```{r}
daily = read.csv(paste0(filepath, "all_var_combined_22_25_BEO_COMP.csv")) #previously daily_2022_2024.csv
daily = daily %>% select(-c(X))
daily$site <- sub("-.*", "", daily$sensor_name)
daily$station <- sub(".*-", "", daily$sensor_name)
daily$sensor_name[daily$site == "BEO"] = "BEO"
```



# Air Temp vs Ground Temp by Site

Variable vs Ground Temp (y-axis)
Group by north vs south and by site?

```{r}
df = daily
df$Date <- as.POSIXct(df$Date, format="%Y-%m-%d")
df <- df %>% filter(windspeed != -888.88) %>% filter(winddirection != -888.88)
```


THAWING
```{r}
nvs <- df %>% filter(sensor_name == "TNHA-SA" | sensor_name == "TNHA-SC" | sensor_name == "SSMH-SB" | sensor_name == "SSMH-SA" | sensor_name == "BEO") %>% select(-c(winddirection)) %>% mutate(aspect = case_when(sensor_name == "TNHA-SC" | sensor_name == "SSMH-SB" ~ "North", sensor_name == "TNHA-SA" | sensor_name == "SSMH-SA" ~ "South", .default = "Control")) %>% filter(grounddepth == "10cm") %>% filter(Date >= "2025-06-01") %>% filter(Date < "2025-09-01")


#BELOW IS FOR CHAPTER 1, REMOVES THE EXTRA "DATE" COLUMN abd keeps grounddepth == 10

# nvs <- df %>% filter(sensor_name == "TNHA-SA" | sensor_name == "TNHA-SC" | sensor_name == "SSMH-SB" | sensor_name == "SSMH-SA" | sensor_name == "BEO") %>% select(-c(winddirection, Date)) %>% mutate(aspect = case_when(sensor_name == "TNHA-SC" | sensor_name == "SSMH-SB" ~ "North", sensor_name == "TNHA-SA" | sensor_name == "SSMH-SA" ~ "South", .default = "Control")) %>% na.omit() %>% filter(windspeed >= 0) %>% filter(grounddepth == 10) %>% filter(Date >= "2022-06-18") %>% filter(Date < "2022-09-01")

```

FREEZING
```{r}
nvs <- df %>% filter(sensor_name == "TNHA-SA" | sensor_name == "TNHA-SC" | sensor_name == "SSMH-SB" | sensor_name == "SSMH-SA" | sensor_name == "BEO") %>% select(-c(winddirection)) %>% mutate(aspect = case_when(sensor_name == "TNHA-SC" | sensor_name == "SSMH-SB" ~ "North", sensor_name == "TNHA-SA" | sensor_name == "SSMH-SA" ~ "South", .default = "Control")) %>% filter(grounddepth == "10cm") %>% filter(Date >= "2025-09-01") %>% filter(Date <= "2025-12-01")

#remember for Ch1 data to add, Date to " select(-c(winddirection, Date))  "

```

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=16}
# Function to extract slope and format it
get_slope_label <- function(data) {
  model <- lm(groundtemp ~ airtemp, data = data)
  slope <- coef(model)[2]
  paste("Slope:", round(slope, 2))
}

# Calculate slopes with fixed positions within plot limits
label_data <- nvs %>%
  group_by(site, aspect) %>%
  do({
    data = .
    model = lm(groundtemp ~ airtemp, data = data)
    slope_label = paste("Slope:", round(coef(model)[2], 2))
    data.frame(slope_label)
  }) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(site, aspect) %>%
  mutate(
    x = 1,  # Fixed x position near left of plot
    y = 9 - (as.numeric(factor(aspect)) - 1) * 1  # Stagger y positions from top
  )

# Your existing ggplot code with custom colors
at = ggplot(nvs, aes(x = airtemp, y = groundtemp, color = aspect)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  facet_wrap(vars(site)) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(color = "Aspect", title = "Summer 2025 Air Temperature vs Ground Temperature (10 cm)", 
       y = "Ground Temperature (°C)", x = "Air Temperature (°C)") +
scale_color_manual(values = c("Control" = "#FFC900",      # gold
                              "North" = "#229A22",    # forest green
                              "South" = "#4110F0"))  +  # royal blue 
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 20, face = "bold", margin = margin(t = 0, r = 0, b = 10, l = 0)),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", colour = "black", margin = margin(t = 10, r = 0, b = 0, l = 0)), 
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", colour = "black", margin = margin(t = 0, r = 10, b = 0, l = 0)), 
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14, colour = "black"),
    legend.key.size = unit(1, 'cm'),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#c7e7ed"),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", colour = "black")
  ) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, color = "black", linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 10)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 10))

# Add slopes to the plot
at + geom_text(
  data = label_data,
  aes(x = x, y = y, label = slope_label, color = aspect),
  hjust = 0, vjust = 0.5, show.legend = FALSE, fontface = "bold"
)
```


```{r}

nfactor_thaw_filtered <- nvs %>% filter(groundtemp > 0 & airtemp > 0 & sensor_name == "SSMH-SB") #THAW

#nfactor_thaw_filtered <- nvs %>% filter(groundtemp < 0 & airtemp < 0 & sensor_name == "TNHA-SA") #FREEZE

DDTa <- sum(nfactor_thaw_filtered$airtemp[!is.na(nfactor_thaw_filtered$airtemp) & !is.na(nfactor_thaw_filtered$groundtemp)], na.rm = TRUE)
DDTs <- sum(nfactor_thaw_filtered$groundtemp[!is.na(nfactor_thaw_filtered$groundtemp) & !is.na(nfactor_thaw_filtered$airtemp)], na.rm = TRUE)


nfactor <- DDTs/DDTa

print(nfactor)

```
